titleStmt.title: SII 11.43: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 43. (B.K. No. 149 of 1926-27). HIRĒHANDIGŌḶ, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB IN THE TEMPLE OF UḌACHAVVA.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Nityavarsha Yasakkenallāta Koṭṭigadēva and is dated in Śaka 893, Pramāthin, current, (wrong for Pramōda) i.e., A.D. 970 when his Gaṅga subordinate Mārasiṅgha-Permāḍi was governing the Purigeṟe Three Hundred and Beḷvola Three Hundred provinces. It registers the regulation of tax, made on the day of Uttarāyaṇa-saṇkrānti in that year by Kontada Peggaḻayya, a son of Vachchhapayya, who was administering Pandigoḷa as achaḷapravṛitti, with the Gāvuṇḍa Nāgiyamma and the Sixty persons of the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . sakavarṣa 893 neya pramāthi samvatsaraṁ pra
varttisa svasti nityavarṣadēva pṛthvīvallabha ma
hārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ
yasakkenallātaṁ śrīkoṭṭigadēvana rājya mutta
rōttarābhivṛddhivarddhamāna mācandrārkkatā
raṁbaraṁ saluttire tatpādapadmōpajīvi koṁguṇi
varmmadharmmamahārājādhirāja kōḷāḷapura
varēśvara nandagirinātha śrīmat mārasiṅgha
permmāḍi purigeṟe mūnūṟu beḷvalamūnū
ṟuma naṇugajīvitamā gāḷuttire tatpāda
padmōpajīvi svasti samastabhuvananilayava
ḷayitārātimakuṭamasṛṇitacaraṇāravi
ndanaravindabāndhava nuḍidante
gaṇḍaṁ vacchapayyana maga śrī kontada peggaḻa
yyaṁ pandigoḷava nacaḷapravṛttiyindāḷuttu
muttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiyandu gāvuṇḍa nāgi
yammaga maṟuvadiṁbarggaṁ koṭṭa vyavasthe yāvu
dendoḍuḻkageraḍu varisa baṭṭevariyara pattu
varisaṁbaṟaṁ mattarvvaṇaṁ Uḻkagūrvvaṟendu mā
ṇalāga tamma svēccheyoḷaṁ negaḻvudu . Inta
ppudaṁ tappidandu vāraṇāsigaṁ kavilegaṁ
brāhmaṇarggaṁ tappidava . baredaṁ
dēvayyaṁ maṅgaḷamahā
śrī .
Digital edition of SII 11.43 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
